# Warden

Warden is an AI code review CLI for TypeScript and JavaScript repos.

Primary pages:

- https://wrdn.beauty/
- https://wrdn.beauty/docs/
- https://wrdn.beauty/examples/
- https://wrdn.beauty/design/

The project emphasizes deterministic tooling, citable external verification, and LLM use as a
triage and formatting layer rather than a source of ungrounded claims.
